title: sansevieria zeylanica
intro: Sansevieria zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon bowstring hemp or snake plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and provide relief from rheumatism. The health benefits of Sansevieria zeylanica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
